headline: Is Stagflation Creeping Into the Picture?
summary: GDP data shows an economy that slowed to a crawl in the fourth quarter of 2025 as inflation picked up.

headline: You Won't Believe the Return You Would Have Made if You Bought Uber Stock 3 Years Ago
summary: Despite the volatility, the scaled mobility and delivery platform has been a winning investment.
